zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor FitzGerald於1473年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達梅諾斯時，她的父親Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare18歲，母親Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare16歲。她於大約1507年與Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor FitzGerald于1473年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達梅諾斯时，她的父亲Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare18岁，母亲Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare16岁。她于大约1507年与Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor FitzGerald was born in 1473, in Maynooth, County Kildare, Ireland, her father, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, was 18 and her mother, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, was 16. She married Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery about 1507. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor FitzGerald est née en 1473, à Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery environ 1507. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor FitzGerald 1473 in Maynooth, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare 18 und ihre Mutter Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare 16. Sie hat um 1507 Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor FitzGerald è nata il nel 1473 nel Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, sua padre, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery circa 1507. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor FitzGeraldが1473年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアメイノオスで生まれた時，父Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildareは18歳，母Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildareは16歳であった。約1507年にDonal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carberyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor FitzGerald(이)가 1473년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 메이노스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1507년 Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor FitzGerald nasceu em 1473, em Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery aproximadamente 1507. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor FitzGerald родилась в 1473 г. в местности меинут, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery около 1507 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor FitzGerald nació en 1473, en Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery aproximadamente 1507. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
